title: 1Stop
description: Voice-enabled transit assistant using n8n, GPT-4.1-mini, Gemini fallback, MongoDB geospatial indexing, Redis caching, Docker deployment, and rate-limited backend APIs.

title: TeXTailor
description: Automates LaTeX resume tailoring using AST analysis, Obsidian integration, Vercel AI SDK, Gemini, SQLite, and Tectonic.

title: BlogBubble
description: React + Node.js blogging platform with Editor.js, Cloudflare R2 uploads, Redis caching, Docker, and Nginx deployment.

title: E-commerce API
description: TypeScript backend with JWT authentication, RBAC, analytics endpoints, and MongoDB.

title: Paginated Product API
description: PostgreSQL API implementing efficient cursor pagination over 200K+ rows.
